articles.title: NASDAQ Index, Dow Jones 30 and S&P 500 Forecast - US Indices Ready to Rise
articles.summary: US indices look like they're ready to start moving at this point; the buyers seem to be aggressively defending drops anytime we get them. At this point, I remain bullish.

articles.title: Is Nasdaq-100 headed towards a correction by 2026 end? Here's what Kalshi bettors think
articles.summary: Traders on Wall Street's favorite prediction platform Kalshi are betting on a correction in the Nasdaq-100 by the end of 2026. The forecast diverges from the Nasdaq's current level of 25,268.14, up 16.
